personal.name: Abhishek Prasad
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.summary: A motivated 3rd-year Computer Science student passionate about building modern web applications, predictive ML models, and impactful digital experiences. Seeking internship and entry-level opportunities.

project.title: Responsive Web Portfolio
project.description: A fully responsive personal portfolio website built with modern HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features smooth animations, client-side form validation, and a mobile-first design approach — boosting user engagement by 30%.

project.title: ML Predictive Model (IBM Internship)
project.description: Developed and optimized predictive models using Scikit-learn. Implemented advanced feature engineering and hyperparameter tuning, increasing model accuracy significantly. Automated data preprocessing pipelines with Pandas and NumPy.

project.title: EDA & Data Insights Dashboard
project.description: Executed comprehensive Exploratory Data Analysis on complex datasets to identify key trends. Provided actionable insights through visualizations that directly influenced project direction and decisions.

project.title: Full-Stack Web Application
project.description: A dynamic full-stack web application built during the NoidaSe Digital internship. Features a responsive UI, REST API integration, and database-driven content achieving a 30% improvement in user engagement.

project.title: Cloud Infrastructure Project (AWS)
project.description: Applied AWS Cloud Foundations knowledge to design and deploy scalable cloud infrastructure. Covers EC2, S3, IAM, and core AWS services, demonstrating understanding of cloud architecture best practices.

project.title: Database Management System
project.description: Designed and implemented a normalized relational database for a college management system. Covers ER modeling, complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and optimization using OOP principles.

points.point: Collaborated with designers to enhance UI/UX, improving customer satisfaction.
Gained hands-on experience with modern web technologies and tools.
Developed responsive websites, boosting user engagement by 30%.
Developed and optimized predictive models using Scikit-learn with advanced feature engineering.
Automated data preprocessing pipelines using Pandas and NumPy, reducing cleaning time.
Executed EDA on complex datasets to identify key trends and drive actionable insights.
